name: basics-runtime
description: Basics Runtime — cloud workflow runtime + voice infra

scripts.dev: doppler run --project backend --config dev -- pnpm -r --parallel dev
scripts.format:check: prettier --check .github/workflows/deploy-production.yml README.md package.json eslint.config.js prettier.config.js api/src/lib/composio.ts api/src/orchestrator/managedAssistantRunner.ts api/src/orchestrator/managedAssistantRunner.test.ts api/src/routes/cloud-chat.test.ts shared/src/composio.ts shared/src/composio.test.ts shared/src/index.ts
scripts.db:generate: doppler run --project backend --config dev -- pnpm --filter @basics/api db:generate
scripts.db:migrate: doppler run --project backend --config dev -- pnpm --filter @basics/api db:migrate
scripts.e2e:live: doppler run --project backend --config dev -- pnpm --filter @basics/api e2e:live
